name: SmartBank - Workflow 2: Surveillance SLA & Escalade Automatique

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  c.Id AS complaintId,
  c.Reference AS RefReclamation,
  ct.Name AS Type,
  c.Priority AS Priorite,
  c.Status AS Statut,
  c.AssignedToUserId AS AgentAssigneId,
  c.AgencyId AS AgenceId,
  c.Description,
  c.CreatedAt AS DateCreation,
  1 AS slaId,
  48 AS SlaHeures,
  c.CreatedAt AS slaDebut,
  c.SLADeadline AS slaDue,
  DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), c.SLADeadline) AS minutesRestantes,
  DATEDIFF(HOUR, c.SLADeadline, GETUTCDATE()) AS heuresDeRetard,
  u.LastName AS agentNom,
  u.FirstName AS agentPrenom,
  u.Email AS agentEmail,
  a.Name AS agenceNom
FROM Complaints c
LEFT JOIN ComplaintTypes ct ON ct.Id = c.ComplaintTypeId
LEFT JOIN Users u ON u.Id = c.AssignedToUserId
LEFT JOIN Agencies a ON a.Id = c.AgencyId
WHERE c.Status NOT IN ('Clôturée', 'Rejetée', 'Closed', 'Rejected')
  AND c.SLADeadline IS NOT NULL
  AND c.SLADeadline < DATEADD(HOUR, 2, GETUTCDATE())
ORDER BY c.SLADeadline ASC

-- 1. Mettre à jour l'escalade
UPDATE Complaints
SET IsEscalated = 1,
    EscalatedAt = '{{ $json.timestampVerification }}'
WHERE Id = {{ $json.complaintId }};

-- 2. Mettre à jour le statut du complaint si en retard critique
{{ $json.niveauEscalade === 'CRITIQUE' || $json.niveauEscalade === 'ROUGE' ? 
  `UPDATE Complaints SET Status = 'Escaladée' WHERE Id = ${$json.complaintId} AND Status NOT IN ('Clôturée', 'Rejetée', 'Closed', 'Rejected');` : '' }}

-- 3. Logger l'escalade dans AuditLogs
INSERT INTO AuditLogs (Action, Entity, EntityId, UserId, CreatedAt, NewValues)
VALUES (
  'SLA_ESCALADE',
  'Complaints',
  {{ $json.complaintId }},
  NULL,
  '{{ $json.timestampVerification }}',
  '{"Level": "{{ $json.niveauEscalade }}", "Delay": "{{ $json.heuresDeRetard }}h", "Action": "{{ $json.actionRequise }}"}'
);

-- 4. Retourner l'objet complet pour le bloc suivant
SELECT 
  c.Id AS complaintId,
  c.Reference AS RefReclamation,
  ct.Name AS Type,
  c.Priority AS Priorite,
  c.AgencyId,
  a.Name AS agenceNom,
  u.FirstName AS agentPrenom,
  u.LastName AS agentNom,
  '{{ $json.niveauEscalade }}' as niveauEscalade,
  '{{ $json.actionRequise }}' as actionRequise,
  '{{ $json.couleurAlerte }}' as couleurAlerte,
  '{{ $json.heuresDeRetard }}' as heuresDeRetard,
  '{{ $json.timestampVerification }}' as timestampVerification,
  '{{ $json.slaDue }}' as slaDue
FROM Complaints c
LEFT JOIN ComplaintTypes ct ON ct.Id = c.ComplaintTypeId
LEFT JOIN Agencies a ON a.Id = c.AgencyId
LEFT JOIN Users u ON u.Id = c.AssignedToUserId
WHERE c.Id = {{ $json.complaintId }};

SELECT 
  u.Id,
  u.LastName AS Nom,
  u.FirstName AS Prenom,
  u.Email,
  r.Name AS roleNom,
  u.AgencyId
FROM Users u
INNER JOIN Roles r ON r.Id = u.RoleId
WHERE r.Name IN ('Responsable', 'Admin', 'ResponsableAgence', 'ResponsableDept', 'Directeur')
  AND u.IsActive = 1
  AND (u.AgencyId = {{ $json.AgencyId }} OR r.Name IN ('Admin', 'Directeur'))
ORDER BY 
  CASE r.Name 
    WHEN 'Directeur' THEN 1
    WHEN 'Admin' THEN 2
    WHEN 'ResponsableDept' THEN 3
    WHEN 'ResponsableAgence' THEN 4
    WHEN 'Responsable' THEN 5
  END ASC

parameters.subject: =[⚠️ ALERTE SLA - {{ $('Mettre à Jour Escalade BDD').item.json.niveauEscalade }}] Réclamation {{ $('Mettre à Jour Escalade BDD').item.json.RefReclamation }}
parameters.message:
=

🚨 STB SmartBank - Alerte SLA

Niveau: {{ $('Mettre à Jour Escalade BDD').item.json.niveauEscalade }}

Bonjour {{ $json.Prenom }} {{ $json.Nom }},

⚠️ Action requise: {{ $('Mettre à Jour Escalade BDD').item.json.actionRequise }}
Référence {{ $('Mettre à Jour Escalade BDD').item.json.RefReclamation }}
Type {{ $('Mettre à Jour Escalade BDD').item.json.Type }}
Agence {{ $('Mettre à Jour Escalade BDD').item.json.agenceNom }}
Agent assigné {{ $('Mettre à Jour Escalade BDD').item.json.agentPrenom }} {{ $('Mettre à Jour Escalade BDD').item.json.agentNom }}
Délai SLA était {{ $('Mettre à Jour Escalade BDD').item.json.slaDue }}
Retard {{ $('Mettre à Jour Escalade BDD').item.json.heuresDeRetard > 0 ? $('Mettre à Jour Escalade BDD').item.json.heuresDeRetard + 'h de retard' : 'Imminente' }}
🔍 Voir la Réclamation
Message automatique généré par SmartBank n8n Workflow - {{ $('Mettre à Jour Escalade BDD').item.json.timestampVerification }}

parameters.jsCode:
console.log('[SmartBank SLA] Aucune réclamation SLA critique trouvée. Système OK.');
return [{ json: { message: 'Aucune réclamation SLA critique', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];
